name: Organization Transformation
environment_block: closet, drawer, or storage space showing initial disorganized state, visible clutter and mess, realistic home organization challenge, warm neutral home tones
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with dramatic before/after reveal, natural hand movement showing organization transformation, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator shows messy space first, then demonstrates organization product in action, reveals clean organized result with satisfying reveal moment, natural satisfaction expression
performance_block: genuine frustration with initial mess, growing satisfaction as organization progresses, joyful reaction at final clean result, authentic transformation emotions
platform_block: realistic TikTok organization content style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, satisfying transformation content, authentic organization enthusiast vibe
lighting_block: natural daylight or warm indoor lighting, soft shadows, realistic home environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure during reveal
motion_block: satisfying before/after reveal sequence, natural hand movements when organizing, smooth product demonstrations, authentic satisfaction reactions
audio_block: subtle drawer opening sounds, product placement sounds, home environment ambience, authentic satisfied speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury home influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
